positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a rising sun over stylized mountains and calm water. The composition features clean, bold, geometric silhouettes in warm earth tones (sienna, burnt orange, deep gold) contrasted with deep indigo and turquoise. The sun is a perfect, stylized semicircle. Emphasize thick, impactful lines and smooth, flat color blocks (flat design, retro travel poster style). The foreground silhouettes should be highly readable and dramatically posed for apparel print placement. Vector illustration, high contrast, maximal clean lines, pop art aesthetic, high detail, centered, rule of thirds composition, designed for t-shirt screen print.
negative: low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, blur, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale, photography, realistic photo, gradient, messy, cluttered, signature, logo
